name: Andes Mint Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
CRUST
1. Crush Oreos in a food processor.
2. Add melted butter and mix.
3. Press into 10 inch springform pan.
CAKE
1. In a large bowl, beat together cream cheese, sugar, eggs, melted semi-sweet chocolate, chopped Andes mint candies, sour cream, and vanilla until smooth.
2. Pour the mixture over the crust in the prepared pan.
